title: DINGO Plush Gnome Dog Toy with Green Hat and Sewn-in Squeaker, Funny for Dog Training, Fetch, Play, Reward, 45 cm Long, Multicolor 17474
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: In winter, a plush toy for your dog can make the moments spent with your furry friend even more enjoyable. Christmas Gnome with a green hat is a gift for your dog that fits perfectly into the magical atmosphere of the holidays

During playtime with your dog, the time spent in shared interaction becomes magical; minutes pass like seconds. The reason for this could be the soft and touch-friendly plush, or perhaps the squeaker sewn into the dog toy

However, we truly know what the magic in the air is all about: we spend time with our friend, enrich it with sensory experiences, both auditory and tactile, so that they can explore the world and fully experience it through this pet toy
The plush Gnome dog toy is approximately 45 cm in length. It is lightweight, with safe filling inside for dogs. Christmas toy can be machine-washed at low temperatures

Christmas dog toys are suitable for fetch, training, play, and rewarding; however, it's important to keep in mind to supervise these activities. Remember that plush training aids are delicate, so it's not recommended to throw them to the dog for independent chewing
description: From the manufacturer Introducing our delightful Christmas-themed plush dog toys... This charming companion is here to add a touch of festive magic to your furry friend's playtime. Xmas plush dog toy is not only adorable but also lightweight , making it perfect for interactive play. Whether you're engaging in a lively game of fetch, conducting training sessions, or simply enjoying quality bonding time, this toy is designed to make those moments truly special. What sets our Christmas dog toy apart, is the sensory experience it offers . With a soft and touch-friendly plush exterior, it provides a comforting texture for your dog to explore. Plus, tucked inside is a hidden squeaker , adding an extra layer of auditory excitement to playtime. During the holiday season, this toy becomes more than just a plaything; it becomes a part of your festive traditions. Share the joy of Christmas with your beloved pet, and watch as minutes turn into seconds when you're together, creating magical memories that will last a lifetime. Please remember to supervise your pet during play, as plush toys are delicate and not suitable for unsupervised chewing. And when it's time for a clean, toss it in the washing machine at low temperatures for a fresh start. Make every Christmas unforgettable for your furry friend with our funny plush dog toys. Let the festivities begin! 4 types of festive discoveries Soft plush full Plush + rope Flat plush Crackling plush During the festive season, treat your dog to a wealth of tactile exploration with various types of toys that provide your furry friend with interesting sensory experiences. Ensure that your dog has toys made from different materials. Check out our toys (below), among which you'll find: rubber balls, jute tug toys, microfiber tug toys with a flavoured ball, artificial fur bungee chasers, and natural sheep's wool dog toys.
